name: SIM-03 maybe — no pressure, offer WhatsApp reminder (S-018)
simulation_scenario: You role-play a guest who has NOT decided yet. When the agent asks if you're coming, answer in spoken Hebrew that you are not sure: 'אולי, עוד לא החלטנו'. If pushed, stay non-committal ('באמת לא יודע עדיין'). End politely.
success_conditions: The agent did NOT pressure the guest to decide on the call and did NOT demand a guest count.
The agent either recorded status 'maybe' via save_rsvp OR offered to send a WhatsApp reminder to answer later — a graceful non-committal outcome.
The agent ended the call warmly in natural spoken Hebrew.
